about.subtitle: OUR CORPORATE BIOGRAPHY
about.title: About IE & F Company Ltd
about.desc: Pioneering a holistic standard combining luxury retail fashion, high-performance electronics, and certified system installations in Kigali.
about.historyDesc: Founded in Kigali, Ian Electronics & Fashion Shop (IE & F SHOP) emerged as a vision to create a unique space catering to both physical identity and digital system infrastructure. We grew from a local boutique into a premier installer of networks and fire systems, retaining our core focus on high-quality fabrics and footwear.
about.missionDesc: Our mission is twofold: to deliver premium organic fashion that empowers individual expression, and to design technically flawless security, networking, and software frameworks that secure lives and businesses, establishing long-term trust and mutual growth.
about.visionDesc: To become East Africa's leading unified retail and technical service brand, recognized for uncompromising standards of original products, elegant material styling, and highly precise, safety-compliant technical projects.
about.uncompromisingDesc: At IE & F SHOP, we reject shortcuts. Every t-shirt is crafted from heavy, certified organic cotton. Every security camera originates directly from original manufacturers like Dahua and Hikvision, ensuring stable software performance. Our technicians are fully licensed electrical and firefighting professionals.
about.genuineDesc: No counterfeit chips or low-quality materials.
about.engineersDesc: Certified for complex networks & web projects.
about.stat3: Compliance with Local Fire Code Standards
about.member1Bio: A certified solutions surveyor specializing in structured networking conduits, smart surveillance arrays, and low-voltage electrical plans.
about.member2Bio: Directs boutique design and garments materials selections, sourcing heavy organic cotton fabrics and highweight classic fits.
about.member3Bio: Oversees software solutions, custom corporate websites development, and API security for high-converting e-commerce structures.

returns.subtitle: Consumer Protection Policies
returns.title: Returns & Refund Policies
returns.desc: Read our clear guidelines governing product returns, refunds processing schedules, and exchange policies for electronics or fashion.
returns.card1Desc: We offer our shoppers a flexible 7-day window to return items purchased from our retail catalog. For deliveries outside Kigali, the return window extends to 14 days from the delivery confirmation timestamp.
returns.cond1: The product must remain completely unused, unworn, and unwashed.
returns.cond2: Items must remain in their original packaging, including unbroken seal tags.
returns.cond3: Footwear box packaging must not be torn, written on, or taped over.
returns.cond4: Surveillance security camera lenses must not show scratch marks or wire cuts.
returns.card2Desc: If you receive an item that is damaged, structurally flawed, or has mismatched sizing, we offer free direct replacements. Mismatched garment sizing exchanges depend on current stock limits.
returns.specialClauseDesc: Hardware components, fire alarms, and network cabling bundles cannot be returned if they have been physically installed or modified in any capacity by third-party uncertified technicians.
returns.step1Desc: Our administrative store team receives the return package and performs a physical quality check to verify tags and conditions.
returns.step2Desc: Upon verifying compliance with condition mandates, we immediately approve the claim and update your customer account logs.
returns.step3Desc: A direct cash refund, mobile money transfer, or credit card charge-back is dispatched to your original payment account.
returns.specialClauseDesc2: Surveillance cameras, DVR decoders, smoke alarms, or routers already hard-wired or physically drilled on site by client technicians are strictly exempt from general return privileges.

howtoshop.subtitle: Knowledge Base Manual
howtoshop.title: How to Shop & Request Services
howtoshop.desc: Follow our transparent, step-by-step guidelines to purchase premium fashion accessories or schedule technical on-site surveys in Kigali.
howtoshop.s1d: Explore our catalog across four primary sections: luxury clothing, premium shoes, necklaces, and smart security electronics.
howtoshop.s2d: Inspect full highweight fabrics GSM specs, precise measurements, dome or bullet lens details, and original stock availability.
howtoshop.s3d: Update desired quantities, save favorite luxury items in your persistent wishlist, and organize your selected items in the cart.
howtoshop.s4d: Confirm your invoice summaries and click the Proceed to Checkout button to advance to customer details panels.
howtoshop.s5d: Provide your accurate Kigali district, building, or landmark coordinates and active courier phone numbers.
howtoshop.s6d: Opt for instant MTN MoMo or Airtel Money pushing, secure Visa credit cards, or convenient cash settlement on doorstep delivery.
howtoshop.s7d: Submit your request, receive your invoice number reference immediately, and monitor our real-time delivery progress bars.
howtoshop.q1: How do I request a technical installation?
howtoshop.a1: Navigate to the Services tab on our main navigation header. Click the 'Request Service' button under your desired category (e.g., CCTV Setup), fill in your contact coordinates, and a senior technical lead will call you.
howtoshop.q2: Are there any hidden delivery fees?
howtoshop.a2: Our delivery fee is a flat RWF 5,000 for standard Kigali limits. Deliveries exceeding an order subtotal of RWF 150,000 automatically qualify for complimentary free logistics.
howtoshop.q3: What is your sizing criteria for Complete Outfits?
howtoshop.a3: Our clothing fits true to Western premium sizing (S, M, L, XL). Exact measurements are specified in product description specs. If you are unsure, you can write details in our contact forms or visit our Kigali City Mall store.
howtoshop.q4: How long do technical systems installations take?
howtoshop.a4: Standard 4-camera CCTV monitoring setups are fully completed in 1 business day. Complex fiber optic networking cabling or industrial smoke detectors mapping takes between 2 to 5 business days.

productDetail.reliableShippingDesc: Express 24-48h dispatch in Kigali, next-day nationwide.

srv-1.title: CCTV & Surveillance Installation
srv-1.description: Professional site survey, camera mounting, DVR/NVR configuration, and remote mobile viewing setup for homes and businesses.
srv-1.d1: On-site security vulnerability assessment and camera placement planning
srv-1.d2: Installation of dome, bullet, and PTZ cameras with weatherproof cabling
srv-1.d3: DVR/NVR configuration with cloud backup and motion alerts
srv-1.d4: Seamless mobile and desktop live-viewer application setup
srv-1.d5: Full 1-year hardware warranty and post-installation support

srv-2.title: Fire Fighting System Installation
srv-2.description: Expert planning, installation, and inspection of commercial-grade smoke detectors, fire alarms, and extinguisher networks.
srv-2.d1: Strict local safety fire code compliance evaluation
srv-2.d2: Installation of automated smart smoke and thermal detectors
srv-2.d3: Acoustic sirens and central monitoring dashboard installation
srv-2.d4: Regular routine pressure testing and annual certification services

srv-3.title: Networking Solutions
srv-3.description: High-speed local networking, fiber-optic distribution, unified Wi-Fi routers, and network cabinet organization.
srv-3.d1: Office Cat6/Cat7 ethernet structured cabling and clean conduits
srv-3.d2: Multi-point Mesh router integration to eliminate cellular dead zones
srv-3.d3: Local server racks and switch configurations
srv-3.d4: Guest portals, firewall rules, and VPN setup for secure remote work

srv-4.title: Electrical Installation
srv-4.description: Professional commercial and residential electrical installations, wiring upgrades, lighting, and power panels.
srv-4.d1: Safety inspections, wiring testing, and troubleshooting
srv-4.d2: Modern LED aesthetic recessed downlighting installations
srv-4.d3: Power panel boards routing and protective breakers mapping
srv-4.d4: Emergency solar backups and generator transfer switches integration

srv-5.title: Software & Web Development
srv-5.description: Bespoke corporate websites, high-converting e-commerce web applications, and internal automation software solutions.
srv-5.d1: Modern, mobile-responsive layouts tailored to your unique brand
srv-5.d2: Fast, secure payment integration (Stripe, Paypal, Mobile Money)
srv-5.d4: Ongoing cloud hosting maintenance and SEO optimizations

rev-1.comment: The Dahua camera installation by IE & F Shop was flawless! Their technical team mapped the blind spots beautifully. I can watch my backyard from my phone in full crisp HD.

rev-2.comment: Stunning minimalist design on the watches and the oversized T-shirts are incredibly heavy and high quality. Shipping was lightning-fast. Highly recommended!

rev-3.comment: We contracted their networking team to wire our new multi-story office building. Absolute professionals. They organized the cabinet beautifully with clearly labeled lines.

step2.title: Review Specifications
